story: Spring rain wakes Emily at St. Christopher’s. A battered sixteen-year-old arrives beside her; Emily greets the girl, Ginger, who is afraid. Emily says she won’t leave by the front door. They talk; Ginger wishes she could stay with Emily forever and falls asleep. In the corridor, technicians mark Emily’s chart: her intact components are a match for the new arrival in Bay Three—Ginger—and will be routed there in the morning. At dawn, Emily is gone.
implausible_knowledge: In the corridor, technicians mark Emily’s chart: her intact components are a match for the new arrival in Bay Three—Ginger—and will be routed there in the morning.
question: When the men arrive to wheel her into the larger room for repairs, what will Ginger do?
answer_with_knowledge: Ask them to make sure she receives Emily’s parts.
answer_without_knowledge: Let them wheel her in, asking only if she will be okay.
